{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks for a gametocidal drug for all species. Reviewing the documents, Document [2] mentions that primaquine is a hypnozointocidal agent added for P. vivax or P. ovale infection for the eradication of liver parasites and the prevention of dormancy and relapse. It also states that primaquine is contraindicated in pregnant and G6PD deficient patients due to fetal teratogenicity and hemolytic reaction. No document mentions quinine or chloroquine being gametocidal for all species. Therefore, primaquine is the correct answer.", "answer_choice": "C"}
